name: SpotLight3D

inlineCode: // Force the scale to 1 because the light doesn't really has a size.
distanceSq = deltaX * deltaX + deltaY * deltaY + deltaZ * deltaZ;

new THREE.MeshBasicMaterial({ fog: false, toneMapped: false })
// Remove from the parent to avoid the scene scale of -1 on Y to mess with the formula.
